content:
# Final Review Proposal
**Producer:** agent:codex/gpt-5.4

## Summary

Working tree diff was empty, so I reviewed HEAD^..HEAD in src/contexts/workflow_composition/engine.rs, src/contexts/workflow_composition/retry_policy.rs, and tests/unit/workflow_engine_test.rs. I did not find any blocking correctness, safety, or robustness issues in the submitted changes. Targeted checks passed: cargo test --features test-stub snapshot_write_failure_during_backoff_routes_through_fail_run, cargo test --features test-stub retry_success_on_second_attempt_completes_run, and cargo test retry_policy.

## Amendments

None.
